title: Update tests for rearchitected tk run
description:
Update and add tests for the rearchitected tk run:

Remove:
- Pool-specific tests (worker claiming, stale recovery, mutex)
- Swarm-specific tests (orchestration prompt, swarm runner)
- Parallel runner tests (multi-epic, per-epic worktrees)
- Checkpoint tests
- Verify tests
- Mode-specific engine tests

Update:
- Engine tests to use wave loop instead of ralph iteration loop
- Worktree handoff tests to work with always-worktree model
- Agent tests to only use WorkDir (no WorktreeName/RepoRoot)

Add:
- Wave runner tests (parallel spawning, signal collection, cancellation)
- Wrap-up phase tests (config parsing, report generation, merge/preserve)
- Integration test: full three-phase run with mock agent
- Resume test: existing worktree detected and reused
acceptance_criteria: All tests pass. No references to pool, swarm, parallel, checkpoint, or verify in test files. New tests cover wave execution, wrap-up, and resume.
closed_reason: All tests updated and passing. Stale references removed.
